description_long: This is a grand piano with a classic, elegant design, featuring a large, curved wooden body and a glossy black exterior. The piano's lid is partially open, revealing the internal strings and hammers, and the keyboard is prominently displayed with alternating white and black keys. Three pedals are visible beneath the keyboard, supported by ornate legs. The piano's surface appears smooth and reflective, with a combination of dark and natural wood tones. Some views show the piano in a partially deconstructed state, exposing internal components such as the soundboard and action mechanism. No visible brand or logo markings are present, and there is no music stand attached.
description: A grand piano with a glossy black and wood finish, partially open lid, and visible internal components. Features a full keyboard and three pedals.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the open lid, full keyboard, and three pedals beneath the piano.
description_view_1: Side and top view highlighting the piano's curved body, partially open lid, and exposed internal structure.
description_view_2: Rear and underside view showing the back of the piano, legs, and more of the internal wooden framework.
description_view_3: Back and partial top view, with the lid open and the keyboard less visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard grand piano keyboard with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement.
